# RCSMessage.Content.dispositionNotification(_:)

**Case**

A content type for disposition notification content.

## Declaration

```swift
case dispositionNotification(RCSMessage.DispositionNotification)
```

## Working with disposition notifications

- **RCSMessage.DispositionNotification**: A structure that represents disposition notification content in an RCS message, such as whether delivery succeeded or failed.

items.description: A structure that represents disposition notification content in an RCS message, such as whether delivery succeeded or failed.
